events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: A/C service on automotive assembly floor, rough-complete stage. Observed condition: wrong oil for compressor type. This is a defect - using incorrect oil (e.g., PAG vs POE or mineral oil mismatch) can damage compressor, cause system failure. Must fail. Risk high/critical. Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 85. Value: not a numeric measurement given, but could estimate oil type mismatch as 0% correct. I'll set value to 0 indicating wrong oil match. Confidence high.
